title: The Army and Air Force Reserves Act, 1950
title_en: The Army and Air Force Reserves Act, 1950
description: An Act to provide for the constitution and discipline of the Bangladesh Army and Air Force Reserves. WHEREAS it is expedient to consolidate and amend the law relating to the government and discipline of the Bangladesh Army and Air Force Reserves; It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content: 1. This Act may be called the [Army and Air Force] Reserves Act, 1950.

provisions.title: 2. Definitions
3. Division of Reserve Forces
provisions.content:
3. (1) The Reserves shall consist of the categories specified in the Schedule to this Act.
(2) The Government may, by notification in the official Gazette, add to, amend or vary the Schedule to this Act.

provisions.title: 4. Liability of reservists to military or air force law
provisions.content: 4. An Army reservist shall be subject to the [* * *] Army Act, 1952 , and the rules and regulations made thereunder and an Air Force reservist shall be subject to the [* * *] Air Force Act, 1953, and the rules and regulations made thereunder, in such manner and to such extent as may be prescribed.

provisions.title: 5. Extent of liability for service
provisions.content: 5. A reservist shall be liable to serve without the limits of Bangladesh as well as within those limits.

provisions.title: 6. Power to make rules
7. Power to make regulations
provisions.content: [7. The Government may make regulations for all or any of the purposes of this Act, other than those specified in section 6.]

provisions.title: 8. Omitted
provisions.content: 8. [Amendment of Act VIII of 1911.- Omitted by section 3 and the 2nd Schedule of the Central Laws (Statute Reform) Ordinance, 1960 (Ordinance No. XXI of 1960).]

provisions.title: 9. Repeal
provisions.content: 9. [Repeal.- Repealed by section 2 and the 1st Schedule. of the Repealing and Amending Ordinance, 1965 (Ordinance No. X of 1965).]

definitions.definition: prescribed by rules made under this Act
the Reserves of the Bangladesh Army or of the Bangladesh Air Force
